meaning: n.谷物,尤指磨成粉用(或已磨成粉的)谷物
examples: The press desperately needs new information, and everything we do is grist for the mill.
Marrying for money isn't just grist for television plot lines.
Even the most determined conspiracy theorists are finding no grist for their mills.
Sidekicks are a requisite for comic relief (and grist for the lucrative merchandising mill).
The London Olympics were grist to its mill and to that of many ordinary citizens.
